---
title: "**School desegregation policies in the city of Barcelona**"
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
---

![](images/Desegpol_logo_transparent%202.png){fig-align="center"}

::: {style="display: flex; align-items: left;"}
<img src="images/geps-logo.png" style="margin-right: 10px;"/> <img src="images/logotip-versio-5-verd-1401x564.png" width="400" height="163"/>
:::

![](images/Llimes-signes.png){fig-align="right"}
